title: Sales Manager Vacancy at IndiGrid - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at IndiGrid - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
IndiGrid, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Kolkata operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IndiGrid:
IndiGrid is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiGrid!
